site.tagline: Precision Plastic Packaging for UK Industry

hero.headline: Precision Plastic Packaging for UK Industry
hero.subheadline: Thermoformed trays, containers and fully bespoke packaging solutions — designed, tested and manufactured in the UK.

about.headline: Built on British Manufacturing Excellence
about.story:
Founded in 2009, SunnyPlaste began as a specialist thermoforming operation supplying regional food manufacturers in the West Midlands. Over fifteen years, we have grown into one of the UK's most trusted plastic packaging manufacturers, serving blue-chip clients across food, pharmaceutical, automotive and retail sectors.

Our 45,000 sq ft facility houses state-of-the-art thermoforming lines, an in-house tooling workshop, and an ISO-certified quality laboratory. Every product that leaves our site has been engineered, tested and validated to the standards your industry demands.

We are independently certified to ISO 9001, ISO 14001, and BRCGS AA Grade — not because we have to be, but because our clients expect nothing less.

capabilities.title: Thermoforming
capabilities.description: State-of-the-art pressure and vacuum forming lines for high-volume, precision packaging.

capabilities.title: In-House Tooling
capabilities.description: Our own mould design and CNC machining capability means faster lead times and lower costs.

capabilities.title: Quality Lab
capabilities.description: ISO-certified on-site testing: dimensional inspection, material analysis, seal integrity.

capabilities.title: Sustainable Materials
capabilities.description: rPET, bio-based and recycled-content options to meet your sustainability commitments.

contact.formSubtext: Tell us about your packaging requirements and our team will respond within 1 business day.
